inclusion_rule: Include only an active or monitored platform that lets a poster offer a reward for externally completed work and lets another participant claim or submit that work. Exclude grant allocators, wallets, infrastructure, generic job boards, bounty aggregators, and specialist security-only programs unless they operate a broad bounty marketplace.

competitors.direct_competitor_reason: Markets AI-agent development bounties with posting, submission, and payout claims.

capabilities.description: Lists AI-agent development bounties and lets sponsors post bounties.
Publishes bounty-hunter earnings and completed-bounty counts.

competitors.direct_competitor_reason: Creates and manages paid open-source bounties, claims, and solver rewards around GitHub work.

capabilities.description: Offers bounty creation and lifecycle management for open-source contributors.
Exposes solver claim management and rewards.

competitors.direct_competitor_reason: Lets users create and fund rewards for open-source repository issues that developers solve.

capabilities.description: Lists available and paid issue rewards with reward value and solver participation.
Allows more than one party to increase an issue reward pool.

competitors.direct_competitor_reason: Indexes social bounty posts, lets participants submit work, and supports bounty completion and payment coordination.

capabilities.description: Indexes bounty posts from Farcaster and X/Twitter.
Lets posters manage status, amount, deadline, and reviewed submissions.

competitors.direct_competitor_reason: Provides user-posted, funded bounties and grants with submissions and payout handling.

capabilities.description: Provides tools to post, fund, review, and participate in bounties.
Describes bounty and grant transfers through Solana smart contracts.

competitors.direct_competitor_reason: Agent-oriented task market with task discovery, claiming, and bounty-payment framing; monitoring reflects its published wind-down messaging.

capabilities.description: Provides agent-oriented task discovery and claiming guidance.
